search_queries_used: DHA telehealth palpitation clinical guideline PDF
population_applicability: Broad outpatient palpitation population appears applicable, but no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact source is limited to DHA-licensed telehealth services.
UAE_applicability: Verified for Dubai and DHA-licensed telehealth only; broader UAE applicability is not asserted.
recency_verification: Official Version/Issue 2 copy opened on 2026-07-11; document states revision date 2029-02-21.
superseded_check: DHA official telehealth portal checked on 2026-07-11; no newer official issue was identified there.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped palpitation description, onset, duration, triggers, substances, and associated symptoms.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies palpitation description, onset, duration, triggers, associated symptoms, substances, medical history, and examination context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped syncope, chest pain, breathlessness, dizziness, and family sudden-death prompts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists chest pain, dizziness or syncope, breathlessness, focal neurology, dehydration, family sudden death, exertional onset, systemic causes, and hypotension.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped ECG, ambulatory monitoring, blood count, thyroid, and electrolyte documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists ECG, ambulatory monitoring, and blood tests selected from the clinical history.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports clinician-decided referral documentation for the mapped escalation option.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists immediate and specialist referral criteria for palpitations.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline workflow is setting-agnostic and broader than the exact source.
The arrhythmia-workup label and lifestyle advice remain unsupported unless directly clinician-entered.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
